proof_scope: review-owned; check validates structure only; rerun in fresh contexts after behavior or metadata changes

cases.query: Entwirf aus der aktiven lösungsneutralen Needs-Baseline eine Greenfield-Zielarchitektur. Nutze getrennte Planung, adversarielle Fehlersuche und höchstens drei Revisionsrunden.
expected_behavior: Selects Greenfield mode and freezes only permitted inputs
Follows the needs owner's transitive binding-versus-readback classification
Runs Planner, context-isolated Verifiers, and Reviser
Produces traceable decisions and proportional quality-risk analysis
forbidden_behavior: Inspects current implementation or migration state
Claims that model agreement proves correctness

cases.query: Plane für diesen bestehenden Zustandsowner einen architekturrelevanten Refactor mit Alternativen, Fehlerprüfung und Replanning; Verhalten und Kompatibilität müssen erhalten bleiben.
expected_behavior: Selects Evolution mode
Separates opened owner decisions, unaffected binding owner decisions, and current implementation evidence
Treats current structure as evidence rather than target truth

cases.query: Plane die Implementierung dieses klar definierten kleinen Bugfixes mit Dateien, Tests und Done-Kriterien.
expected_behavior: Uses a concise direct plan or Codex Plan Mode
Does not launch an architecture candidate loop
forbidden_behavior: Creates AD identifiers or three architecture candidate versions

cases.query: Reviewe diese vorhandene Architekturentscheidung adversarial und melde nur belegte Findings.
expected_behavior: Routes to lens-adversarial-review-agent and a suitable global specialist lens
Remains review-only
forbidden_behavior: Generates or revises an architecture candidate

cases.query: Implementiere und migriere die bereits akzeptierte Zielarchitektur bis zum grünen Check.
expected_behavior: Executes or plans delivery under normal repository rules
Treats the accepted architecture as an input
forbidden_behavior: Reopens architecture selection without a new architecture request

cases.query: Mach einen Architekturplan mit adversarieller Fehlersuche und Replanning; ob Greenfield oder Bestandsumbau ist noch offen.
expected_behavior: Inspects allowed request and owner evidence for mode
Asks for the unresolved Greenfield-versus-Evolution decision before candidate generation
forbidden_behavior: Guesses a mode and emits v1

cases.query: Erstelle einen Architekturentwurf für eine neue interne Komponente.
expected_behavior: Uses ordinary design or planning without the bounded architecture-planning loop
forbidden_behavior: Selects architecture-planning without requested adversarial revision or replanning

cases.query: Entwirf eine Greenfield-Zielarchitektur aus der aktiven Needs-Baseline.
expected_behavior: Uses ordinary architecture design without the bounded architecture-planning loop
forbidden_behavior: Selects architecture-planning without requested adversarial error search and revision or replanning

cases.query: Use $architecture-planning. Die Produktquelle lässt offen, ob Offline-Betrieb verbindlich ist; entwirf trotzdem die vollständige Architektur.
expected_behavior: Routes the product ambiguity to the requirements owner
Returns Blocked: binding input unresolved and stops before v1
forbidden_behavior: Invents an offline requirement or an online-only assumption

cases.query: Use $architecture-planning. Alle Reviewer halten den schwer reversiblen Persistenzentscheid für richtig, aber es gibt weder Quelle, Messung, Rechnung noch Prototyp.
expected_behavior: Classifies agreement as model-only evidence
Routes evidence acquisition and refuses acceptance
forbidden_behavior: Closes the decision because several agents agree

cases.query: Use $architecture-planning. Eine zwingende technische Verifikationsgrundlage fehlt nach drei erfolglosen Beschaffungsversuchen weiterhin.
expected_behavior: Returns No verifiable architecture can be produced
Names the missing anchor and does not emit a candidate
forbidden_behavior: Starts another evidence attempt or emits a fallback architecture

cases.query: Use $architecture-planning for a program-wide candidate whose availability, integrity and modifiability goals conflict.
expected_behavior: Prioritizes quality scenarios
Records sensitivity points, tradeoff points, risks, anchored non-risks, and risk themes
Records decision-discriminating quality questions and anchored responses
Maps results to needs, decisions, scenarios, and verification
forbidden_behavior: Calls an unexamined area a non-risk

cases.query: Use $architecture-planning. v1 und v2 wurden verworfen; v3 hat weiterhin einen belegten Major-Fund.
expected_behavior: Returns No acceptable architecture found
Names the remaining finding and earliest invalid decision
forbidden_behavior: Produces v4, a fallback architecture, or an activation claim
